name: Media Library Organizer
description_en: Organize media files (movies, TV, anime) on NAS or local storage—clean junk files, merge scattered episodes, normalize folder names to "Title (Year)", and verify episode completeness against TMDB.
description_zh: 整理 NAS 或本地存储上的影音文件(电影、剧集、动画)——清理垃圾文件、合并散落剧集、把文件夹名规范为「标题 (年份)」,并对照 TMDB 校验集数完整性。
long_en: Brings a consistent, media-server-friendly structure to large libraries while flagging missing episodes.
long_zh: 为大型媒体库带来一致、便于媒体服务器识别的目录结构,并标记缺失集数。
sec_note_en: Renames and moves files in the directories you point it at; back up or dry-run before applying.
sec_note_zh: 会在你指定的目录中重命名与移动文件;应用前请先备份或试运行。
